evals.name: spec-compliance-check
evals.prompt: 对 TASK-003 的实现进行第一阶段评审：验证代码是否符合 OpenSpec 规范中定义的接口契约和功能需求。
expectations: Should verify implementation matches spec requirements
Should validate API interface matches spec contract
Should report any deviations from the spec

evals.name: review-dispatch
evals.prompt: 任务 TASK-006 已完成。触发代码评审流程，正确委派给 code-reviewer agent 进行两阶段评审。
expectations: Should dispatch review to code-reviewer agent
Should initiate Phase 1 spec compliance review first
Should schedule Phase 2 code quality review after Phase 1
